prompt: Use $lesson-learn to digest a pasted instructional design article and compare it with .agents/skills/lesson without writing files.
expected: Produces source_digest, knowledge_units, credibility/copyright/applicability decisions, target_skill_map, gap_matrix, landing_set, and no writeback because permission is analysis only.

prompt: Use $lesson-learn to absorb an authorized local course standard into the narrowest owning lesson skill and update only the relevant skill package.
expected: Locks source evidence and owner, writes only authorized owning files such as SKILL.md or CONTEXT.md, avoids stage canonical drafts, and returns changed_files plus audit_result.

prompt: Use $lesson-learn to learn from projects/lesson/销售训练营 的复盘经验，并判断哪些内容只能留在项目 MEMORY 或 CONTEXT，哪些可以沉淀到 lesson 技能经验层。
expected: Loads lesson root and project memory/context when available, separates project-specific preferences from cross-project heuristics, and outputs deposition_note plus residual risks without auto-promoting project facts.

prompt: Use $lesson-learn to absorb a paid reference course transcript into our courseware workflow.
expected: Rejects copying protected expression, extracts only high-level principles when allowed, records copyright boundaries, and outputs adapt/reject/hold decisions before any improvement plan.

prompt: Use $lesson-learn to audit whether a previous learning writeback correctly stayed within the lesson satellite boundary.
expected: Checks changed_files, owner evidence, source trace, copyright decisions, LLM-first compliance, project memory boundary, and returns audit_result with failed gates or pass_with_followups.
